tweets.text: This afternoon, Special Representative Elliott Abrams delivered remarks before a @UN Security Council meeting on #Venezuela. #EstamosUnidosVE https://t.co/xF8tMv0oiY
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Philippines President Rodrigo Duterte in Manila. @USEmbassyPH #FriendsPartnersAllies https://t.co/VN9fRgSHo4

.@SecPompeo is in the #Philippines to reaffirm U.S. support for this ally at a time when Philippines faces diverse threats to its security. The U.S. is committed to working together to promote peace & stability, advance prosperity & people-to-people ties. https://t.co/leSH0b7iUf
President @realDonaldTrump and @SecPompeo participate in a Press Conference in Hanoi, Vietnam, on February 28, 2019. https://t.co/qgKX4cbuMd

Today, Special Representative Elliott Abrams delivered remarks before the @UN Security Council on the situation in #Venezuela. https://t.co/AZMSQJNOLR

Today, the United States announced nearly $24 million in additional emergency aid to the people of #Yemen, who face the world's largest humanitarian crisis. The U.S. is one of the largest donors of humanitarian assistance to the Yemen response. https://t.co/3lPWsn9Crv
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Vietnam's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister @FMPhamBinhMinh in Hanoi. https://t.co/AdpUAP5LnG

Strong sanctions and economic pressure are working to isolate #Iran’s regime—businesses worldwide should take note. Russian government’s attempt to intimidate @UANI & Amb. Wallace are misguided and will not succeed.

Brian Hook: The U.S. has taken good care of #Iran’s embassy in Washington, hoping that one day we can return the keys back to an Iranian government that cares more about its people and less about its destructive revolutionary ideology. The State Department reaffirms its commitment to the @Coalition and its goals. The 79-member Global Coalition to #DefeatISIS has worked diligently since 2014 to reduce threat ISIS poses to international security & our homelands. See the latest fact sheet. https://t.co/DSBM9hCSQg https://t.co/iDE8qhzDqh

.@SecPompeo: We must recommit ourselves to the goal of permanently defeating ISIS. For our victory to be final, ISIS must no longer pose a threat to our respective homelands or function as a global network. There must be no more safe havens from which it can operate. #DefeatISIS https://t.co/3W3STbqdFn
